name: Baby Bunting Group Limited
analysis: BBN has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 49% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$1.6100. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.6700, stop A$1.4008, target A$2.3100 (2.38:1) — then trail it.
